{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forged dragon
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Forged dragon]] appeared over the [[Sage]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
